## Problem

What governance problem needs to be solved?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change at a high level.

## Affected Documents

List the files or modules that should be updated.

## Ratification Requirement

Which body should approve this change, and by what threshold?

## Risks

Identify any risks to member rights, riding autonomy, accessibility, or
administrative burden.
